title: January 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 17''' is the 17th day of the year. 348 days (349 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1930s|1931]] – [[James Earl Jones]] is born.
*[[1950s|1957]] – [[Ann Nocenti]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Genndy Tartakovsky]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 50|''Star Wars Weekly'' 50]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 82|''Star Wars'' (1977) 82]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Shea Standefer]] is born.
*[[1989]] – [[Kelly Marie Tran]] is born.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire Volume 7: The Wrong Side of the War]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[The Fight in the Forest (book)|''The Fight in the Forest'']] published.
*2017 – ''[[Poe and the Missing Ship]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 6|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 6]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 42|''Star Wars'' (2015) 42]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Forces of Destiny—Hera]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance]]'' opens at [[Disneyland]].
*[[2022]] – [[5-Minute Star Wars Stories (audiobook)|''5-Minute Star Wars Stories'' audiobook]] released in [[Wikipedia:German|German]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes I–III, 1999–2005]]'' reprinted.
*[[2024]] – [[Bounty Hunters 42|''Bounty Hunters'' 42]] published.
*2024 – [[Obi-Wan Kenobi 4|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 4]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 3|''The High Republic'' (2023) 3]] published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] rereleased for [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 4|PlayStation 4]] and [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 5|PlayStation 5]].
